results.name: scry
results.description: See also [scry-like](scry-like) for effects that are like scry, but don't use the keyword.

results.name: sculpture
results.description: A sculpted work, from carved stone, cast metal, etc.

results.name: scythecat
results.description: Cats. With scythes. Please be careful.

results.name: sea gate (zendikar)
results.description: A great wall on the edge of Tazeem in Zendikar. It was host to Tazeem's largest settlement. Ulamog was nearly subdued here in BFZ, before Kozilek emerged and destroyed Sea Gate.

results.name: seahorse
results.description: A type of fish. Not actually a horse. (But see also [hippocamp](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/hippocamp).)

results.name: seal
results.description: As in the animal. Sea puppers!

results.name: seaweed
results.description: Large, grass-like algae that grows at the bottom of bodies of w ater.

results.name: second draw matters
results.description: Cards that care when the player casting or controlling them draws their second card for the turn.

results.name: second spell matters
results.description: Cards that care when the player casting or controlling them casts their second spell for the turn.

results.name: secret squirrel
results.description: These arts have a squirrel-shaped thing hidden away. 🐿️

results.name: seek-card
results.description: Seek for a card of any type.

results.name: seek-mv
results.description: Seek cards with a certain mana value.

results.name: seek-self
results.description: Cards that seek other copies of themselves.

results.name: seek-to-battlefield
results.description: Seek a card onto the battlefield.
